titleStmt.title: SII 25.98: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 98. (A.R. No. 98 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.

This built in inscription which is not fully preserved may be assigned to about the 12th century on grounds of palaeography. It commences with the praśasti of the king Tirumagaḷ-puṇara, etc. of the king.

It states that the mūlaparushai of Tirupputtūr, a brahmadēya in Kēraḷaśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu after making an announcement (vāyiṟ-chāṟṟi) met at the Naralōkavīraṉ-tiruv-eḍuttukkaṭṭi in the temple of Niṉṟaruḷiṉa Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-viṇṇagar-āḻvār of Kaṟkuḷaṅgarai and transacted the sale of lands āvaṇattu-nattam and a tank in the village Vēlaṅguḍi, a hamlet to the west of Tirupputtūr, for the deity Śrītaḷi-Paramēśvara of the place. The sale-price of 120 kaḻañju of gold was received by the sabhai from the temple treasury of the above deity and made over the lands, after making it tax free for the Naralōkavīraṉ-sandhi to be conducted in the midday as an endowment of Uyyavandāṉ Kaṇḍadēvaṉ alias Dēvar Kāṅgēyar. A village named Varaguṇapuram figures as one of the boundaries of the saleland.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷ puṇara pukaḻ makaḷ viḷaṅka vikkiramac jayamakaḷ poṟpuyattiruppa kaṉaka meruviṟ kayal viḷaiyāṭa Irunilattoru tani veṇkuṭai niḻaṟṟat tirumaṇi cūṭi taṉ Urimaiyiṟ cūṭi Ulaku potu niṅka Oru kolo
cci vañci maṉṉarum vaṭapula ventarum Añci vantiṟaiñci Aṭimalar cūṭa maṉṉiya virasiṅṅāsaṉattu Ulaka muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya māmutal matikkulam viḷakkiya komutal komāṟavaṟmarāṉa tri[bhuva]ṉic cakkaravarttikaḷ
śrī parākkiramapāṇṭiya devaṟkuyāṇṭu 3 Āvatu keraḷaciṅka vaḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyan=tirupputtūr mulaparṣaiyom vāyiṟcāṟṟi nammur kaṟkuḷaṅkarai niṉṟaruḷiṉa jeyaṅkoṇṭa coḻaviṇṇakarāḻvār toyilil naralokavīraṉ tiruveṭu
ttuk kaṭṭiyil kūṭṭakkuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyirun=tu śrītaḷi parameśvaraṟku nammūr melpiṭākai velaṅkuṭiyum Āvaṇattu nattamum Uḷḷiṭṭa nilaṅkaḷil Ittevar paḻan tevatāṉaṅkaḷum Arumpūṟ kūṟṟatāṭakattukku viṭṭa nilaṅkaḷum nikki niṉṟa nila muṟṟukkum vilai �
—�ka Iṟaiyiṟakkavum Ittevar śrīpaṇṭārattuk kaikkoṇṭa poṉ 100 5(1/2)ḷa Ippoṉ nūṟṟaṅkaḻañcaraiyum Ittevar śrī paṇṭārattu nel viṟṟirunta kācāl Uṭalāṉa poṉ 10 4(1/2)ḷam Ākap poṉ 100 2 10mā Ippoṉ nūṟṟirupatiṉ kaḻañcum sabhaiyomey kaiPortion built in.
—ṇṭu Ivvelaṅkuṭiyum kuḷamum Āvaṇattu nattamum Uyyavan=tāṉ kaṇṭatevaṉāṉa devar kāṅkeyar taṉmamāka naralokavīraṉ cantikkuc celvatākak kuṭutteṉRead kuṭuttom •. Ittanmañcellumiṭattu Uccic can=tikku muṉpey celvatākavum Innilaṅkaḷukkup perunāṉBuilt in.
kellai kiḻellai Iṭṭa cūlak kalakkaḷukku meṟkum teṉṉellai kaṟkuḷaṅkarai niṉṟaruḷiya jeyaṅkoṇṭa coḻaviṇṇakarāḻvār cikovin=taviḷākattu vacakki viḷaintu varukiṟa viḷaitaṭikaḷile kiḻakku meṟku nokkip pokiṟa vaḻi vaṭavācaṟutiyile Iṭ

ṭa cūlakkalkkaḷukku vaṭakkum melellai varakuṇapurattū rellaikkalkkaḷukkum kaṟukkai I—
kkaḷukku teṟkum Āka Ic cuṭṭappaṭṭa Ellaiyil Akappaṭṭa nilattuk kiṭāraṅkoṇṭa coḻa—
p peṟāteṉṟu colluvār grāmadrohikaḷāvatākavum Ipparicu Iṟai Iḻicciyum vilaiperuḷarak—
Digital edition of SII 25.98 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
